title: Blurring
description: A modern motion blur mod with 3 types of blurring for your convenience.
body:
# What is Blurring?

Blurring is a lightweight and customizable motion blur mod for Minecraft that adds smooth cinematic blur effects while moving your camera, turning, sprinting, and looking around.

The mod is designed to improve visual smoothness while staying clean, simple, and performance-friendly.

# Features

- Smooth Motion Blur Rendering
- Adjustable Blur Strength
- Multiple Blur Types
- Blend Mode Support
- In-Game Settings Screen
- Mod Menu Integration
- Lightweight & Optimized
- Clean Modern Visuals
- Fabric Support

# Customization

Blurring allows you to customize the visual feel of the blur effect directly in-game.

You can:
- Adjust blur intensity
- Change blur styles
- Configure blend modes
- Fine-tune the visual smoothness

# Performance

The mod is built to stay lightweight and responsive while still providing a smooth cinematic effect during gameplay.

# Compatibility

- Fabric Supported
- Works with Mod Menu
- Compatible with most visual and utility mods
- Designed for modern Minecraft versions

# Common Questions

- **Does this affect gameplay?**  
  No, the mod is purely visual.

- **Can I disable or reduce the blur?**  
  Yes, all blur settings are fully customizable.

- **Will this lower FPS?**  
  The mod is optimized to minimize performance impact, though results may vary depending on hardware and settings.

# Modpack Permissions

You may include this mod in modpacks as long as proper credit and a link to the original project page are provided.

# Support the Project

Blurring is developed in my free time and will continue receiving updates, improvements, and new features over time.

If you enjoy the mod and want to support development, you can support the project here:

[☕ Buy Me a Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/shortieos)

Support helps with:
- Continued development
- Performance improvements
- New visual effects and settings
- Compatibility updates
- Future mod projects

Thank you for supporting the project ❤️
